title: Associated Label
text: Associated Label An Associated Label belongs to a Component Field. The text of an associated label can be changed using ProcScript. In the runtime label, the user can give the associated field focus by clicking the label, or change the value (for selected widgets). Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: lbl Main Development Object? No Part of: Component Entity Contains: Property Generalization: Label Specializations: — Compilation Output: — Specialization Associated Label specializes Label in the following ways: The Associated Label property specifies the name of the associated field. It has the same Name as a component field. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
